global.title: Tesla (TSLA) Q2 2026 delivery consensus: 406,000 vehicles expected
global.summary: Tesla released its company-compiled delivery consensus for the second quarter of 2026, and Wall Street analysts now expect the automaker to deliver 406,024 vehicles. That would be just 5.7% growth over the 384,122 vehicles Tesla delivered in Q2 2025 — a modest recovery for a company that has posted

global.title: The Jeep Recon EV goes on sale for $67,000 with a limited range
global.summary: Jeep’s electric off-roader is now on sale, starting at $67,000, but its driving range comes up a bit short of expectations.

global.title: BYD’s pickup spotted in China with a different look
global.summary: BYD’s plug-in hybrid pickup is already a hit in several overseas markets, but a new prototype was spotted driving in China with a slightly different design.

global.title: Podcast: Slate’s $25,000 electric pickup, Polestar banned from US, Tesla FSD crash, and more
global.summary: In the Electrek Podcast, we discuss the most popular news in the world of sustainable transport and energy. In this week’s episode, we discuss Slate’s $25,000 electric pickup, Polestar being banned from the US, Tesla FSD crashes coming into focus, and more.

global.title: Slate’s electric truck can still dip under $20,000 — but only for some
global.summary: Slate Auto’s electric truck now starts at $24,950, but some buyers will still drive one home for under $20,000 thanks to state-level EV rebates. The catch is that those discounts depend heavily on where you live and how much you earn — and several of them may not apply to Slate at all.

global.title: Final Prime Day Deals: Segway GT3 Pro superscooter first discount, EcoFlow 3,600Wh power station at $1,399 2026 low, more
global.summary: It’s the final day of Amazon’s ongoing Prime Day savings, and we have no clue how much longer a lot of the deals will last after today, so be sure to get your picks in before they’re gone. Headlining this final edition is Segway’s first-ever discount on the monstrous GT3 Pro Electric SuperScooter to

global.title: GM’s new EV platform is expected to debut in the next-gen Chevy Equinox
global.summary: The new version of GM’s dedicated electric vehicle platform is reportedly set to arrive near the end of 2028, and the Chevy Equinox EV will be the first to ride on it.

global.title: This Canadian team has raced solar cars since 1992, and they’re bringing their best yet to the 2026 Electrek American Solar Challenge
global.summary: This July, the 2026 Electrek Formula Sun Grand Prix (FSGP) and American Solar Challenge (ASC) head north to Minnesota. Meanwhile, I caught up with one of the teams making the trip, and they’ve been racing solar cars longer than almost anyone. Éclipse, out of École de technologie supérieure (ÉTS) in

global.title: Hyundai’s small electric SUV just got a little more upscale
global.summary: Hyundai launched the Inster Lounge in Europe, a new range-topping model that brings a touch of luxury to the small electric SUV segment.

global.title: EIA: Renewables just hit 30% of US electricity generation
global.summary: Renewables accounted for 30.0% of total US electrical generation during the first third of 2026, up 2.2% year over year, according to new data recently released by the US Energy Information Administration (EIA), and reviewed by the SUN DAY Campaign.
